# Z00Z Deep Wiki

> Source-cited wiki for the Z00Z Rust workspace covering protocol objects, wallet state, settlement storage, runtime publication, simulator evidence, transport seams, and onboarding material for multiple audiences.

The repository is organized around owner crates with stable facades. The pages below inline the generated wiki content so coding agents can inspect both the high-level explanation and the original source citations in one place.

## Onboarding

<doc title="Onboarding Hub" path="./onboarding/index.md">

Z00Z is a privacy-focused blockchain workspace with separate crates for protocol, wallet, storage, runtime, simulator, and observability concerns. The best onboarding path depends on whether you need implementation detail, architectural judgment, business risk framing, or user-facing capability language. [Cargo.toml:3-17](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/Cargo.toml#L3-L17) [README.md:1-4](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/README.md#L1-L4)

## 🎯 Guide Selector

| Guide | Audience | What You'll Learn | Time |
|---|---|---|---|
| [Contributor Guide](./contributor-guide.md) | New contributors with Python/JS experience | Repo setup, crate reading order, object model, verify flow, first change checklist | ~30 min |
| [Staff Engineer Guide](./staff-engineer-guide.md) | Staff/principal engineers | The core ownership insight, cross-crate seams, risks, and deep-reading order | ~45 min |
| [Executive Guide](./executive-guide.md) | Engineering leaders | Capability map, scaling pressure, risk profile, and next-quarter priorities | ~20 min |
| [Product Manager Guide](./product-manager-guide.md) | Product managers and non-engineering stakeholders | What users can do, what the system cannot do yet, privacy and artifact constraints | ~20 min |

## 🧭 Orientation Map

```mermaid
graph LR
  Hub[Onboarding Hub] --> Contrib[Contributor Guide]
  Hub --> Staff[Staff Engineer Guide]
  Hub --> Exec[Executive Guide]
  Hub --> PM[Product Manager Guide]
```
<!-- Sources: Cargo.toml:3-17, crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:11-37, crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:62-92 -->

</doc>

<doc title="Contributor Guide" path="./onboarding/contributor-guide.md">

This guide assumes you already know how to program in Python or JavaScript and need a working mental model for a Rust workspace that treats ownership boundaries, stable facades, and release-style verification as first-class concerns. [Cargo.toml:3-17](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/Cargo.toml#L3-L17) [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L103-L132) [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:64-103](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L64-L103)

## 🎯 At A Glance

| Topic | What matters first | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Workspace shape | Fourteen default workspace members, each with clear ownership. | [Cargo.toml:3-34](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/Cargo.toml#L3-L34) |
| Protocol core | `z00z_core` owns assets, genesis, policies, rights, vouchers. | [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L103-L132) |
| Wallet surface | Wallet inventory is typed; assets, vouchers, and rights are not interchangeable. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:11-37](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L11-L37) |
| Verification | The repository expects a full verify cycle, not only `cargo test`. | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:64-103](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L64-L103) |

## 🧩 Part I: Rust For Python And JavaScript Engineers

| Concept | Rust in this repo | Python/JS analogy | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Crate root facade | `src/lib.rs` re-exports supported public API. | Module `__init__.py` or package barrel export, but stricter. | [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:112-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L112-L132) |
| Feature flags | Cargo features gate optional behavior like deterministic RNG or WASM. | Optional dependency flags or build-time environment switches. | [crates/z00z_core/Cargo.toml:43-59](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/Cargo.toml#L43-L59) [crates/z00z_wallets/Cargo.toml:153-187](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/Cargo.toml#L153-L187) |
| Result-oriented error flow | Public crates publish typed errors instead of throwing dynamically. | Explicit exception classes, but encoded in function signatures. | [crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:56-83](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs#L56-L83) |

```mermaid
graph TB
  Cargo[Cargo workspace] --> Crate[crate src/lib.rs]
  Crate --> Public[stable public exports]
  Crate --> Internal[implementation modules]
```
<!-- Sources: Cargo.toml:3-34, crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132, crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs:97-156 -->

## 🧭 Part II: This Codebase

### 📦 Project Structure

```mermaid
graph TB
  Root[Workspace Root] --> Core[z00z_core]
  Root --> Wallet[z00z_wallets]
  Root --> Storage[z00z_storage]
  Root --> Runtime[z00z_runtime]
  Root --> Rollup[z00z_rollup_node]
  Root --> Simulator[z00z_simulator]
  Root --> Networks[z00z_networks]
```
<!-- Sources: Cargo.toml:3-17, crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml:38-55 -->

| Directory or crate | Why it exists | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `crates/z00z_core` | Protocol object and genesis authority. | [crates/z00z_core/README.md:22-43](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/README.md#L22-L43) |
| `crates/z00z_wallets` | Wallet state, object inventory, RPC, persistence. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:27-37](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L27-L37) |
| `crates/z00z_storage` | Settlement truth and proof surfaces. | [crates/z00z_storage/README.md:4-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/README.md#L4-L18) |
| `crates/z00z_simulator` | End-to-end scenario harness and artifact producer. | [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:46-60](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L46-L60) |

### 🔑 Core Concepts

```mermaid
erDiagram
  ASSET ||--o{ WALLET_OBJECT : projected_as
  RIGHT ||--o{ WALLET_OBJECT : projected_as
  VOUCHER ||--o{ WALLET_OBJECT : projected_as
  SETTLEMENT_ROOT ||--o{ PROOF_BLOB : verifies
  SETTLEMENT_ROOT ||--o{ CHECKPOINT_ARTIFACT : binds
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:13-37, crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs:45-57, crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:85-95 -->

| Term | Plain-English meaning | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Asset | Spendable value object. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:16-17](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L16-L17) |
| Voucher | Conditional claim object with lifecycle rules. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:17-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L17-L18) |
| Right | Authority object, not spendable balance. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:18-19](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L18-L19) |
| Settlement root | Storage-owned state commitment. | [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:94-121](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md#L94-L121) |

### 🔄 Request Lifecycle

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant User
  participant Wallet
  participant Storage
  participant Runtime
  participant Watcher
  User->>Wallet: build or inspect object
  Wallet->>Storage: commit settlement-facing state
  Runtime->>Storage: plan and validate publication
  Watcher-->>User: alerts and observation evidence
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_wallets/src/rpc/mod.rs:43-91, crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs:83-93, crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/src/lib.rs:13-20 -->

## 🚀 Part III: Getting Productive

### ⚙️ Prerequisites And Setup

| Tool | Version hint | Install or verify command | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Rust toolchain | Rust 1.90 workspace target | `rustup show` | [Cargo.toml:49-60](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/Cargo.toml#L49-L60) |
| WASM target | Needed for wallet browser lane | `rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown` | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:97-99](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L97-L99) |
| Verify gate | Repository-local script | `./.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh` | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:64-103](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L64-L103) |

### 🛠️ Your First Task

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  Read[Read owner README and src/lib.rs] --> Change[Make focused change]
  Change --> Test[Run targeted crate test]
  Test --> Verify[Run full verify gate]
  Verify --> Review[Prepare review]
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_core/README.md:3-20, crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:171-183, .github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:64-103 -->

1. Start with the crate README and crate root.
2. Change the owner crate, not a nearby helper crate.
3. Run a targeted command such as `cargo test -p z00z_core --release --all-features`.
4. Finish with `./.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh --max-safe-run`.

### 🧪 Running Tests

| Goal | Command | Source |
|---|---|---|
| All workspace tests | `cargo test --all` | [.github/copilot-instructions.md:141-149](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/copilot-instructions.md#L141-L149) |
| One crate | `cargo test -p z00z_core --release --all-features` | [crates/z00z_core/Cargo.toml:43-69](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/Cargo.toml#L43-L69) |
| Wallet WASM check | `cargo check -p z00z_wallets --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features wasm` | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:117-127](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L117-L127) |
| Simulator CLI wiring | `cargo run -p z00z_simulator --bin scenario_1 -- --help` | [crates/z00z_simulator/bin/scenario_1.rs:71-73](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/bin/scenario_1.rs#L71-L73) |

### ⚠️ Common Pitfalls

| Symptom | Cause | Fix |
|---|---|---|
| Change compiles locally but breaks release verification | You skipped the full verify gate. | Run the repository script, not only crate-local tests. |
| A voucher or right appears in a cash-only path | You treated `wallet.asset.*` as a generic object API. | Keep typed-object work under `wallet.object.*`. |
| Simulator code deep-imports another crate | Harness code started owning a business rule. | Add or use a stable facade in the owner crate. |

### 📚 Quick Glossary

| Term | Meaning |
|---|---|
| Facade | The stable public API exported from a crate root or shallow module. |
| Owner crate | The crate that defines the canonical semantics for a concern. |
| Settlement | The storage-owned representation of committed object state. |
| Publication | Runtime movement of validated batches toward durable evidence. |
| Release packet | The public evidence set emitted by scenario and verification flows. |

<doc title="Staff Engineer Guide" path="./onboarding/staff-engineer-guide.md">

The central architectural fact about Z00Z is simple but load-bearing: semantic truth is intentionally fragmented by owner crate so that no convenience layer silently becomes the second authority for protocol, settlement, wallet, or transport behavior. [crates/z00z_core/README.md:22-43](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/README.md#L22-L43) [crates/z00z_storage/README.md:4-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/README.md#L4-L18) [crates/z00z_networks/rpc/README.md:5-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/rpc/README.md#L5-L18)

## 🎯 Executive Summary

| Topic | Position | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Protocol semantics | Live in `z00z_core`. | [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L103-L132) |
| Settlement truth | Lives in `z00z_storage`. | [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs:32-93](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs#L32-L93) |
| Planner and publication flow | Live in `z00z_runtime/aggregators`. | [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/src/lib.rs:18-44](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/src/lib.rs#L18-L44) |
| Final theorem composition | Lives in `z00z_rollup_node`. | [crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:85-165](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs#L85-L165) |

## 🔑 The Core Architectural Insight

Z00Z is easier to reason about if you model it as a chain of owner crates rather than a chain of services. Every downstream layer is expected to consume the owner’s public contract and stop there.

```python
def route_change(change_kind: str) -> str:
    if change_kind in {"asset_semantics", "genesis", "voucher_rules", "rights"}:
        return "z00z_core"
    if change_kind in {"wallet_inventory", "receiver", "wallet_rpc"}:
        return "z00z_wallets"
    if change_kind in {"settlement_root", "proof_blob", "checkpoint_root"}:
        return "z00z_storage"
    if change_kind in {"planner", "publication_binding", "verdict"}:
        return "z00z_runtime"
    return "re-evaluate ownership"
```

## 🧭 System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TB
  Core[z00z_core] --> Wallet[z00z_wallets]
  Core --> Storage[z00z_storage]
  Wallet --> Rpc[z00z_networks_rpc]
  Storage --> Aggregators[z00z_runtime/aggregators]
  Storage --> Validators[z00z_runtime/validators]
  Storage --> Watchers[z00z_runtime/watchers]
  Aggregators --> Rollup[z00z_rollup_node]
  Wallet --> Simulator[z00z_simulator]
  Rollup --> Simulator
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_wallets/Cargo.toml:76-87, crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml:38-55, crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:15-31 -->

## 🗂️ Domain Model

```mermaid
erDiagram
  ASSET_DEFINITION ||--o{ ASSET : instantiates
  POLICY ||--o{ RIGHT : constrains
  POLICY ||--o{ VOUCHER : constrains
  VOUCHER }o--|| RIGHT : may_require
  WALLET_OBJECT }o--|| SETTLEMENT_ROOT : committed_under
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:116-132, crates/z00z_core/src/vauchers/voucher_policy.rs:7-18, crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:13-37, crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:172-183 -->

| Entity | Invariant | Enforced by | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Voucher | `remaining_value` must not exceed `face_value`, and live vouchers need a positive remainder unless terminal. | `VoucherConfigEntry::validate()` | [crates/z00z_core/src/vauchers/voucher_config.rs:162-205](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/vauchers/voucher_config.rs#L162-L205) |
| Voucher bootstrap entry | Shape must validate before policy/action IDs are resolved. | `VoucherBootstrapEntryV1::validate()` | [crates/z00z_core/src/vauchers/voucher_bootstrap.rs:31-66](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/vauchers/voucher_bootstrap.rs#L31-L66) |
| Settlement root | Semantic root and proof-local physical root must stay distinct. | Settlement README and proof contracts | [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:104-121](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md#L104-L121) |

## 🧱 Key Abstractions

```mermaid
classDiagram
  class RpcTransport
  class WalletService
  class SettlementStore
  class AggregatorService
  class ValidatorService
  class WatcherService
  class NodeRuntime
  WalletService --> RpcTransport
  AggregatorService --> SettlementStore
  ValidatorService --> SettlementStore
  WatcherService --> SettlementStore
  NodeRuntime --> AggregatorService
  NodeRuntime --> ValidatorService
  NodeRuntime --> WatcherService
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs:64-98, crates/z00z_wallets/src/services/mod.rs:16-24, crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs:83-88, crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/src/lib.rs:34-44, crates/z00z_runtime/validators/src/lib.rs:14-28, crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/src/lib.rs:13-20, crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md:12-15 -->

## 🔄 Request Lifecycle

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant Wallet
  participant Storage
  participant Agg as AggregatorService
  participant Val as ValidatorService
  participant Rollup
  Wallet->>Storage: publish settlement-facing object state
  Agg->>Storage: bind publication and exec handoff
  Val->>Storage: verify object package and proof contract
  Rollup->>Storage: verify settlement theorem bundle
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:172-183, crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md:14-16, crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:97-165 -->

## 🔁 State Transitions

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Bootstrap
  Bootstrap --> WalletProjection
  WalletProjection --> SettlementCommitted
  SettlementCommitted --> Published
  Published --> Validated
  Validated --> Observed
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs:26-176, crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:27-37, crates/z00z_runtime/validators/README.md:15-18, crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md:13-16 -->

## 📋 Decision Log

| Decision | Alternatives considered | Rationale | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Keep RPC transport-only | Full network stack in the RPC crate | Preserves reusable transport semantics without importing auth or peer policy. | [crates/z00z_networks/rpc/README.md:5-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/rpc/README.md#L5-L18) |
| Keep OnionNet crate-shaped before implementation | Wait until overlay code is ready | Avoid namespace churn and future path rewrites. | [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:27-31](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md#L27-L31) |
| Keep simulator separate | Put scenario glue into wallet or runtime crates | Prevents harness behavior from becoming production ownership. | [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:12-22](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L12-L22) |

## 📈 Performance Characteristics

| Hot path | Observable characteristic | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Genesis generation | Uses Rayon and logs current CPU thread count during generation. | [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs:17-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs#L17-L25) |
| Rollup theorem verification | Re-serializes and rechecks structure, digest, roots, and inclusion without private witnesses. | [crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:141-197](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs#L141-L197) |

## 🛡️ Security Model

| Concern | Current stance | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Weak genesis seed | Rejected during schema validation. | [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config_validate.rs:57-78](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config_validate.rs#L57-L78) |
| Voucher replay and malformed lifecycle | Rejected by voucher validation rules. | [crates/z00z_core/src/vauchers/voucher_config.rs:177-220](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/vauchers/voucher_config.rs#L177-L220) |
| Wallet object/cash boundary | Voucher and right IDs must not leak into cash-only send/receive paths. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:38-44](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L38-L44) |

## 🧪 Testing Strategy

| Area | Evidence surface | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Repository-wide verification | `full_verify.sh` runs format, lint, tests, doc, bench, runnable targets, and optional heavy stages. | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:73-83](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L73-L83) |
| Scenario integration | `scenario_1` crate binary plus stage contract artifacts. | [crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml:26-36](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml#L26-L36) [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:75-92](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L75-L92) |

## ⚠️ Known Technical Debt

| Issue | Risk level | Affected files | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `performance.num_threads` is parsed and validated but not visibly applied to a dedicated Rayon pool in the orchestration path. | Medium | `genesis_config.rs`, `genesis_config_validate.rs`, `genesis_run.rs` | [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs:205-221](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs#L205-L221) [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs:17-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs#L17-L25) |
| `onionnet` is intentionally placeholder-only, so future overlay work remains an integration risk until real code lands. | Medium | `crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/src/lib.rs:13-126](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/src/lib.rs#L13-L126) |

## 📚 Where To Go Deep

| Order | Read next | Why |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | [Object Model And Genesis](../03-core-protocol/object-model-and-genesis.md) | Understand bootstrap truth and typed objects. |
| 2 | [Settlement Runtime And Rollup](../05-storage-runtime/settlement-runtime-and-rollup.md) | Follow those objects into committed storage and theorem verification. |
| 3 | [Scenario Pipeline](../06-simulator-and-quality/scenario-pipeline.md) | See how the multi-crate contract is exercised. |

## 📖 References

- [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L103-L132)
- [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs:32-93](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs#L32-L93)
- [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/src/lib.rs:18-44](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/src/lib.rs#L18-L44)
- [crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:97-165](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs#L97-L165)
- [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:12-22](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L12-L22)

## Related Pages

| Page | Relationship |
|---|---|
| [Crate Boundaries](../02-architecture/crate-boundaries.md) | Architectural prerequisite for the ownership-first model above. |
| [Object Model And Genesis](../03-core-protocol/object-model-and-genesis.md) | First deep technical reading pass. |
| [Settlement Runtime And Rollup](../05-storage-runtime/settlement-runtime-and-rollup.md) | Follows the owner-crate chain into durable evidence. |

</doc>

<doc title="Executive Guide" path="./onboarding/executive-guide.md">

Z00Z is organized as a set of explicit owner crates for protocol, wallet state, settlement storage, runtime publication, and end-to-end scenario evidence. That separation reduces hidden coupling, but it also means delivery risk concentrates at the interfaces between crates rather than inside one deployable service. [Cargo.toml:3-17](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/Cargo.toml#L3-L17) [crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md:3-15](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md#L3-L15)

## 🎯 Capability Map

| Capability | Status | Maturity | Dependencies | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Confidential protocol object model | Built | Medium | `z00z_core`, `z00z_crypto` | [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L103-L132) |
| Typed wallet inventory | Built | Medium | `z00z_wallets`, `z00z_storage` | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:11-37](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L11-L37) |
| Settlement proof and checkpoint surface | Built | Medium | `z00z_storage`, `z00z_rollup_node` | [crates/z00z_storage/README.md:4-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/README.md#L4-L18) [crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md:3-15](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md#L3-L15) |
| Distributed planner/runtime simulation | Partial | Medium | runtime crates, simulator | [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md:3-29](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md#L3-L29) [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:62-92](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L62-L92) |
| Privacy overlay networking | Planned placeholder | Low | `onionnet` | [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:3-31](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md#L3-L31) |

## 🧭 Architecture At A Glance

```mermaid
graph LR
  Protocol[Protocol and crypto] --> Wallet[Wallet and RPC]
  Protocol --> Storage[Settlement storage]
  Storage --> Runtime[Planning validation observation]
  Runtime --> Rollup[Rollup node]
  Wallet --> Simulator[Scenario harness]
  Rollup --> Simulator
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132, crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs:97-156, crates/z00z_storage/src/lib.rs:4-15, crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md:3-15, crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:6-30 -->

## 🧩 Team Topology

| Component family | Implied owner domain | Criticality | Bus factor | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Protocol and genesis | Core protocol team | High | Low-to-medium | [crates/z00z_core/README.md:22-43](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/README.md#L22-L43) |
| Wallet and RPC | Wallet/application team | High | Low-to-medium | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:47-55](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L47-L55) |
| Storage and runtime | Platform/runtime team | High | Low-to-medium | [crates/z00z_storage/README.md:4-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/README.md#L4-L18) [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md:18-29](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md#L18-L29) |
| Simulator and telemetry | Developer productivity/ops | Medium | Medium | [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:46-60](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L46-L60) [crates/z00z_telemetry/README.md:3-12](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_telemetry/README.md#L3-L12) |

## ⚠️ Risk Assessment

| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation | Owner | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Boundary drift between owner crates | Medium | High | Keep changes at stable facades and enforce full verify gate. | Platform leads | [crates/z00z_utils/README.md:20-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_utils/README.md#L20-L25) [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:64-103](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L64-L103) |
| Placeholder networking overlay | High | Medium | Treat OnionNet as roadmap scope, not production capability. | Network leads | [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:27-31](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md#L27-L31) |
| Hidden performance expectations in genesis threading | Medium | Medium | Either wire `performance.num_threads` into pool selection or document current global-pool behavior. | Core protocol leads | [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs:205-221](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs#L205-L221) [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs:17-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs#L17-L25) |

## 📈 Cost And Scaling Model

| Cost driver | Scaling behavior | Trigger for next investment | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Genesis and proof-heavy CPU work | Scales with proof generation and verification volume. | When proof throughput becomes a release bottleneck. | [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/mod.rs:83-89](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/mod.rs#L83-L89) |
| Runtime publication and observation | Scales with planned batches and publication evidence. | When route, verdict, or observation stages dominate latency. | [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md:11-16](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md#L11-L16) [crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md:13-16](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md#L13-L16) |

## 🗺️ Dependency Map

```mermaid
graph TB
  Wallet[z00z_wallets] --> Rpc[z00z_networks_rpc]
  Wallet --> Storage[z00z_storage]
  Runtime[z00z_runtime] --> Storage
  Rollup[z00z_rollup_node] --> Runtime
  Simulator[z00z_simulator] --> Wallet
  Simulator --> Rollup
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_wallets/Cargo.toml:76-87, crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml:46-55, crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:19-31 -->

## 📊 Technical Debt Summary

| Issue | Business impact | Effort to fix | Priority | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Unimplemented privacy-overlay seam | Delays network-mode roadmap promises. | Medium | High | [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:27-31](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md#L27-L31) |
| Genesis threading config not visibly applied | Can create misleading operator expectations for bootstrap runs. | Small-to-medium | Medium | [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs:205-221](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs#L205-L221) |

## ✅ Recommendations

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  Now[Now] --> A[Harden owner-crate boundaries in reviews]
  Now --> B[Document or implement genesis thread control]
  Now --> C[Keep OnionNet roadmap language honest]
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_utils/README.md:20-25, crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs:205-221, crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:27-31 -->

1. Treat owner-crate boundaries as a delivery KPI, because most correctness and security risk lives at those seams.
2. Close the `performance.num_threads` expectation gap before scaling bootstrap workloads or externalizing operator guidance.
3. Keep OnionNet in roadmap language only until the placeholder crate turns into a verified implementation surface.

## 📖 References

- [Cargo.toml:3-17](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/Cargo.toml#L3-L17)
- [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs:205-221](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs#L205-L221)
- [crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md:3-15](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md#L3-L15)
- [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md:18-29](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md#L18-L29)
- [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:27-31](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md#L27-L31)

## Related Pages

| Page | Relationship |
|---|---|
| [Staff Engineer Guide](./staff-engineer-guide.md) | Technical source for the leadership abstractions in this guide. |
| [System Overview](../02-architecture/system-overview.md) | Direct engineering architecture context. |

</doc>

<doc title="Product Manager Guide" path="./onboarding/product-manager-guide.md">

Z00Z is designed to handle several kinds of private digital objects, not just cash-like balances. The important product distinction is that some objects are spendable money, some are redeemable claims, and some are permissions that let a user perform specific actions. [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:13-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L13-L25)

## 🎯 User Journey Map

```mermaid
graph LR
  Bootstrap[System starts with bootstrap objects] --> Wallet[User wallet sees owned objects]
  Wallet --> Transfer[User sends or receives value]
  Wallet --> Voucher[User accepts or redeems a voucher]
  Wallet --> Right[User uses a permissioned action]
  Transfer --> Evidence[System emits verification evidence]
  Voucher --> Evidence
  Right --> Evidence
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_core/README.md:22-43, crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:13-37, crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:67-92 -->

## 📦 Feature Capability Map

| Feature | Status | User-facing behavior | Limitations | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Private asset holding and transfer | Live | Users can hold and move asset-based value. | Cash lane is assets-only; not every object type is spendable. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:16-17](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L16-L17) [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:38-44](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L38-L44) |
| Voucher flows | Live in scenario and wallet object model | Users can hold, accept, reject, transfer, redeem, refund, or let vouchers expire. | Voucher activity is not the same as cash balance. | [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:69-73](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L69-L73) |
| Permissioned rights | Live in object model | Users can hold authority objects that enable allowed actions. | Rights contribute zero spendable value. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:18-19](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L18-L19) |
| Privacy overlay networking | Planned | A future privacy transport mode is reserved. | The crate is currently a placeholder, not a complete product surface. | [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:27-31](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md#L27-L31) |

## 🧾 Data Model (Product View)

```mermaid
erDiagram
  USER ||--o{ WALLET_OBJECT : owns
  WALLET_OBJECT ||--o| ASSET : may_be
  WALLET_OBJECT ||--o| VOUCHER : may_be
  WALLET_OBJECT ||--o| RIGHT : may_be
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:13-37 -->

## ⚙️ Configuration And Feature Controls

| Flag or control | What it changes | Default meaning | Who should treat it carefully | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `wallet_debug_tools` | Enables debug-only plaintext wallet dump tooling. | Off in normal product flows. | Engineering only. | [crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml:22-24](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml#L22-L24) [crates/z00z_wallets/Cargo.toml:185-187](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/Cargo.toml#L185-L187) |
| `wasm` wallet build | Enables browser-facing wallet build checks. | Off unless the browser lane is being built. | Engineering and QA. | [crates/z00z_wallets/Cargo.toml:171-173](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/Cargo.toml#L171-L173) |

## ⏱️ Performance And Expectations

| Operation | Expected behavior | Constraint | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Genesis bootstrap | Produces the initial object set and manifest. | Thread tuning is not visibly driven by the manifest field in the current orchestration path. | [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs:17-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs#L17-L25) |
| Scenario evidence generation | Produces asset, voucher, right, wallet, validator, and watcher evidence files. | This is an integration harness, not a user-facing application shell. | [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:75-92](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L75-L92) |

## ⚠️ Known Limitations

| Limitation | User impact | Workaround | Planned fix signal | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Rights and vouchers are not cash inputs | Users cannot spend those objects through cash-only asset flows. | Use typed object flows, not cash transfer paths. | None stated; current rule is explicit. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:38-44](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L38-L44) |
| Privacy overlay is not yet live | Product cannot promise that network mode today. | Position it as roadmap only. | Placeholder namespace already reserved. | [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:27-31](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md#L27-L31) |

## 🔒 Data And Privacy

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  WalletObjects[Owned objects] --> Settlement[Committed settlement state]
  Settlement --> Evidence[Validator and watcher evidence]
  Evidence --> Reports[Artifacts and summaries]
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:29-37, crates/z00z_storage/README.md:4-18, crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md:13-16, crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:75-92 -->

| Data type | Where it shows up | Retention or policy hint | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Owned objects | Wallet inventory and object RPC surfaces. | Unknown-policy objects stay quarantined instead of becoming spendable immediately. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:20-21](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L20-L21) |
| Settlement evidence | Storage roots, proofs, checkpoint artifacts. | Managed as storage-owned truth. | [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:104-121](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md#L104-L121) |
| Simulator release artifacts | Flow JSON files and summary docs. | Public evidence anchors are named explicitly. | [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:75-89](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L75-L89) |

## 📚 Glossary

| Term | Plain-language meaning |
|---|---|
| Asset | A spendable private value object. |
| Voucher | A claim that may need acceptance or redemption steps. |
| Right | A permission object that enables a specific kind of action. |
| Settlement | The committed record of object state. |
| Scenario | A reproducible multi-step exercise of the system. |

## ❓ FAQ

| Question | Answer | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Can users treat vouchers like money? | No. Voucher objects are separate from cash-only asset flows. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:16-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L16-L18) [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:38-44](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L38-L44) |
| Is the privacy overlay already a product feature? | No. The repository reserves the namespace, but the overlay remains placeholder scope. | [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:27-31](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md#L27-L31) |
| Where does proof and publication evidence come from? | From storage, runtime, validator, watcher, and simulator artifact flows. | [crates/z00z_storage/README.md:4-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/README.md#L4-L18) [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:75-92](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L75-L92) |

## 📖 References

- [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:13-44](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L13-L44)
- [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:67-92](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L67-L92)
- [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:27-31](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md#L27-L31)
- [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:104-121](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md#L104-L121)

## Related Pages

| Page | Relationship |
|---|---|
| [Contributor Guide](./contributor-guide.md) | More technical version of this capability map. |
| [Settlement Runtime And Rollup](../05-storage-runtime/settlement-runtime-and-rollup.md) | Deeper engineering explanation of the evidence flow. |

</doc>


## Architecture

<doc title="System Overview" path="./02-architecture/system-overview.md">

The architecture is intentionally layered around ownership, not around one universal service abstraction. `z00z_core` defines protocol objects, `z00z_crypto` and `z00z_utils` provide shared primitives, `z00z_wallets` and `z00z_storage` own durable user and settlement state, runtime crates process publication and verdicts, and `z00z_rollup_node` composes the live rollup-facing theorem path. [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L103-L132) [crates/z00z_crypto/src/lib.rs:31-102](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_crypto/src/lib.rs#L31-L102) [crates/z00z_utils/src/lib.rs:20-69](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_utils/src/lib.rs#L20-L69) [crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:33-45](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs#L33-L45)

## 🎯 At A Glance

| Layer | Responsibility | Key file | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Protocol | Asset, genesis, policy, right, voucher contracts. | `crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L103-L132) |
| Shared primitives | Crypto, codecs, config, I/O, logging, metrics, time, RNG. | `crates/z00z_crypto/src/lib.rs`, `crates/z00z_utils/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_crypto/src/lib.rs:31-102](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_crypto/src/lib.rs#L31-L102) [crates/z00z_utils/src/lib.rs:20-69](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_utils/src/lib.rs#L20-L69) |
| User state | Wallet inventory, receiver and tx facades, RPC registration. | `crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs:97-156](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs#L97-L156) |
| Settlement and runtime | Storage truth, planning, validation, observation. | `crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs`, `crates/z00z_runtime/*/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs:32-93](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs#L32-L93) [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/src/lib.rs:18-44](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/src/lib.rs#L18-L44) |
| Composition and harness | Rollup node and simulator. | `crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs`, `crates/z00z_simulator/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:85-165](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs#L85-L165) [crates/z00z_simulator/src/lib.rs:6-39](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/src/lib.rs#L6-L39) |

## 🧭 Layer Map

```mermaid
graph TB
  Utils[z00z_utils] --> Core[z00z_core]
  Crypto[z00z_crypto] --> Core
  Core --> Wallet[z00z_wallets]
  Core --> Storage[z00z_storage]
  Storage --> Validators[z00z_runtime/validators]
  Storage --> Watchers[z00z_runtime/watchers]
  Storage --> Rollup[z00z_rollup_node]
  Wallet --> Rpc[z00z_networks_rpc]
  Wallet --> Simulator[z00z_simulator]
  Rollup --> Simulator
  Aggregators[z00z_runtime/aggregators] --> Rollup
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_wallets/Cargo.toml:76-87, crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml:38-55, crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:15-31 -->

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant Genesis as z00z_core::genesis
  participant Wallet as z00z_wallets
  participant Store as z00z_storage
  participant Runtime as z00z_runtime
  participant Rollup as z00z_rollup_node
  Genesis->>Wallet: bootstrap objects and definitions
  Wallet->>Store: settlement-facing objects and proofs
  Runtime->>Store: publication and verdict consumption
  Rollup->>Store: checkpoint and theorem verification
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_core/README.md:22-43, crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:27-37, crates/z00z_storage/README.md:4-18, crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md:3-15 -->

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  Input[Protocol object] --> Decide{Who owns the truth?}
  Decide -->|Definition and semantics| Core[z00z_core]
  Decide -->|Wallet-local inventory| Wallet[z00z_wallets]
  Decide -->|Committed root and proof| Storage[z00z_storage]
  Decide -->|Batch planning| Aggregators[z00z_runtime/aggregators]
  Decide -->|Verdict or observation| Runtime[z00z_runtime validators/watchers]
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_core/README.md:22-43, crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:23-37, crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:82-121, crates/z00z_runtime/validators/README.md:13-18, crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md:11-16 -->

## 📦 Architectural Rules Visible In Code

| Rule | How the code shows it | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Shared primitives are centralized | `z00z_utils` re-exports codec/config/io/logger/metrics/rng/time from one crate. | [crates/z00z_utils/src/lib.rs:20-69](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_utils/src/lib.rs#L20-L69) |
| Crypto remains behind one facade | `z00z_crypto` re-exports the supported public crypto surface from its crate root. | [crates/z00z_crypto/src/lib.rs:53-155](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_crypto/src/lib.rs#L53-L155) |
| Wallet transport is distinct from overlay/network policy | `z00z_networks_rpc` limits itself to transport and dispatch; OnionNet is a separate placeholder boundary. | [crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs:4-19](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs#L4-L19) [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/src/lib.rs:2-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/src/lib.rs#L2-L18) |
| Rollup node is a composition root, not a second protocol owner | `z00z_rollup_node` wires services and verifies a theorem bundle instead of minting new semantics. | [crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md:3-15](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md#L3-L15) [crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:97-165](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs#L97-L165) |

## 📖 References

- [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L103-L132)
- [crates/z00z_crypto/src/lib.rs:31-155](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_crypto/src/lib.rs#L31-L155)
- [crates/z00z_utils/src/lib.rs:20-69](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_utils/src/lib.rs#L20-L69)
- [crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:97-165](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs#L97-L165)
- [crates/z00z_simulator/src/lib.rs:6-39](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/src/lib.rs#L6-L39)

## Related Pages

| Page | Relationship |
|---|---|
| [Crate Boundaries](./crate-boundaries.md) | Explains the ownership rules underneath this layered map. |
| [Object Model And Genesis](../03-core-protocol/object-model-and-genesis.md) | Details the protocol layer shown here. |
| [Settlement Runtime And Rollup](../05-storage-runtime/settlement-runtime-and-rollup.md) | Expands the storage/runtime/rollup layers. |

</doc>

<doc title="Crate Boundaries" path="./02-architecture/crate-boundaries.md">

Z00Z’s most important architectural habit is that each crate says what it owns and what it must not absorb. The READMEs and crate roots are unusually explicit about these negative boundaries, so they are the right source for deciding whether a change belongs in an owner crate, a transport seam, or the simulator. [crates/z00z_utils/README.md:3-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_utils/README.md#L3-L25) [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md:18-29](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md#L18-L29) [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:12-22](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L12-L22)

## 🎯 At A Glance

| Boundary owner | Owns | Refuses to own | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `z00z_utils` | Shared infrastructure primitives. | Product-domain behavior. | [crates/z00z_utils/README.md:3-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_utils/README.md#L3-L25) |
| `z00z_networks_rpc` | Transport dispatch and adaptation. | Peer identity, auth, retry, lifecycle policy. | [crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs:4-19](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs#L4-L19) |
| `z00z_storage` | Settlement roots, proofs, and stores. | Generic backup ownership and public physical-root authority. | [crates/z00z_storage/README.md:4-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/README.md#L4-L18) [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:104-121](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md#L104-L121) |
| `z00z_simulator` | Cross-crate harness behavior and artifacts. | A second owner for wallet, storage, crypto, or network rules. | [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:12-22](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L12-L22) |

## 🧭 Ownership Decision Tree

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  Start[Need to add behavior] --> Scope{What changes?}
  Scope -->|Generic I/O or config| Utils[z00z_utils]
  Scope -->|Protocol object semantics| Core[z00z_core]
  Scope -->|Wallet UX, inventory, or tx wire| Wallet[z00z_wallets]
  Scope -->|Settlement root, proof, or path| Storage[z00z_storage]
  Scope -->|Planner or verdict path| Runtime[z00z_runtime/*]
  Scope -->|Only harness glue| Simulator[z00z_simulator]
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_utils/README.md:11-25, crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:23-37, crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:82-121, crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:12-22 -->

```mermaid
graph LR
  Utils[z00z_utils] -->|shared primitives only| Core[z00z_core]
  Rpc[z00z_networks_rpc] -->|transport only| Wallet[z00z_wallets]
  Onion[OnionNet] -->|overlay placeholder| Wallet
  Storage[z00z_storage] -->|settlement truth| Runtime[z00z_runtime]
  Runtime -->|planning and verdicts| Rollup[z00z_rollup_node]
  Simulator[z00z_simulator] -->|stable facades only| Wallet
  Simulator --> Storage
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_utils/README.md:53-77, crates/z00z_networks/rpc/README.md:5-18, crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:16-31, crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:24-30 -->

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant Dev
  participant README as Owner README
  participant Facade as Stable Facade
  participant Impl as Internal Module
  Dev->>README: confirm owner and exclusions
  README-->>Dev: preferred seam
  Dev->>Facade: make change at supported boundary
  Facade-->>Dev: stable public contract
  Dev->>Impl: descend only when owner is confirmed
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_core/README.md:3-20, crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:171-183, crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:144-157 -->

## 🔑 Reserved And Protected Seams

| Seam | Why it exists | Practical implication | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `z00z_networks/onionnet` placeholder | Reserves the namespace and module layout before live overlay code lands. | New privacy-overlay work should fill reserved modules in place instead of inventing a new crate. | [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:3-31](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md#L3-L31) |
| `z00z_telemetry` thin facade | Holds one stable observability entrypoint without yet claiming richer behavior. | Observability code should point here, but domain semantics still belong elsewhere. | [crates/z00z_telemetry/README.md:3-12](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_telemetry/README.md#L3-L12) |
| `z00z_extensions` boundary | Preserves a space for repository-owned add-ons. | Extensions may compose owner APIs but must not fork ownership. | [crates/z00z_extensions/README.md:3-12](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_extensions/README.md#L3-L12) |

## 📖 References

- [crates/z00z_utils/README.md:3-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_utils/README.md#L3-L25)
- [crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs:4-19](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs#L4-L19)
- [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:104-121](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md#L104-L121)
- [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md:18-29](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md#L18-L29)
- [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:12-30](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L12-L30)

## Related Pages

| Page | Relationship |
|---|---|
| [Workspace Map](../01-getting-started/workspace-map.md) | Lists the crates whose boundaries are described here. |
| [Wallet Architecture](../04-wallet-and-rpc/wallet-architecture.md) | Shows one of the most boundary-sensitive crates in detail. |
| [Networking And Telemetry](../07-networking-and-observability/networking-and-telemetry.md) | Expands the transport and reserved-overlay seams mentioned here. |

</doc>


## Getting Started

<doc title="Workspace Overview" path="./01-getting-started/workspace-overview.md">

The first useful fact about Z00Z is that the repository is not a single executable with helper folders around it. It is a Cargo workspace whose root manifest, crate READMEs, and crate roots all treat ownership boundaries as the primary architectural control. [Cargo.toml:1-76](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/Cargo.toml#L1-L76) [crates/z00z_core/README.md:3-17](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/README.md#L3-L17) [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:6-30](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L6-L30)

## 🎯 At A Glance

| Component | Responsibility | Key file | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Workspace root | Declares members, default members, and workspace-wide package metadata. | `Cargo.toml` | [Cargo.toml:1-76](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/Cargo.toml#L1-L76) |
| Protocol owner | Exposes assets, genesis, policies, rights, and vouchers. | `crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L103-L132) |
| Wallet owner | Publishes the stable wallet, receiver, stealth, and tx entrypoints. | `crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs:97-156](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs#L97-L156) |
| Storage owner | Publishes settlement, checkpoint, snapshot, and backend seams. | `crates/z00z_storage/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_storage/src/lib.rs:4-15](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/lib.rs#L4-L15) |
| Integration harness | Runs repository scenarios through stable facades. | `crates/z00z_simulator/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_simulator/src/lib.rs:6-39](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/src/lib.rs#L6-L39) |

## 🧭 Workspace Shape

```mermaid
graph TB
  Root[Cargo Workspace] --> Protocol[z00z_core]
  Root --> Crypto[z00z_crypto]
  Root --> Utils[z00z_utils]
  Root --> Wallet[z00z_wallets]
  Root --> Storage[z00z_storage]
  Root --> Runtime[z00z_runtime/*]
  Root --> Rollup[z00z_rollup_node]
  Root --> Networks[z00z_networks/*]
  Root --> Simulator[z00z_simulator]
  Root --> Telemetry[z00z_telemetry]
  Root --> Extensions[z00z_extensions]
```
<!-- Sources: Cargo.toml:3-17, crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml:38-55, crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md:3-15 -->

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  Repo[Repository Root] --> Readmes[Read crate README]
  Readmes --> Facades[Read src/lib.rs facade]
  Facades --> Owner[Choose owner crate]
  Owner --> Tests[Run targeted tests]
  Tests --> Gate[Run full verify gate]
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_core/README.md:3-20, crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:171-183, crates/z00z_storage/README.md:4-18, .github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:64-103 -->

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant Reader
  participant Root as Cargo.toml
  participant Crate as Crate Root
  participant Repo as Repository Gate
  Reader->>Root: inspect workspace members
  Root-->>Reader: crate list and default build surface
  Reader->>Crate: inspect README + src/lib.rs
  Crate-->>Reader: stable facade and boundaries
  Reader->>Repo: run verification commands
  Repo-->>Reader: regression evidence
```
<!-- Sources: Cargo.toml:3-34, crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132, crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs:97-156, .github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:73-83 -->

## 📦 Crate Families

| Family | Crates | Why they are separate | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Domain core | `z00z_core` | Keeps assets, genesis, policies, rights, and vouchers behind one protocol owner. | [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L103-L132) |
| Shared primitives | `z00z_crypto`, `z00z_utils` | Crypto and cross-cutting infrastructure stay reusable and audited once. | [crates/z00z_crypto/README.md:7-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_crypto/README.md#L7-L25) [crates/z00z_utils/README.md:3-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_utils/README.md#L3-L25) |
| User and transport edges | `z00z_wallets`, `z00z_networks/rpc`, `z00z_networks/onionnet` | Wallet state, RPC transport, and privacy-overlay concerns are intentionally not collapsed. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:47-55](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L47-L55) [crates/z00z_networks/rpc/README.md:3-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/rpc/README.md#L3-L18) [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:16-31](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md#L16-L31) |
| State and publication | `z00z_storage`, `z00z_runtime/aggregators`, `validators`, `watchers`, `z00z_rollup_node` | Storage owns settlement truth; runtime plans; validators and watchers consume published state; rollup node composes. | [crates/z00z_storage/README.md:4-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/README.md#L4-L18) [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md:3-16](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md#L3-L16) [crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md:3-15](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md#L3-L15) |
| Harness and support | `z00z_simulator`, `z00z_telemetry`, `z00z_extensions` | Scenario execution, telemetry entrypoints, and repository-owned add-ons stay outside the domain owners. | [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:6-30](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L6-L30) [crates/z00z_telemetry/README.md:3-12](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_telemetry/README.md#L3-L12) [crates/z00z_extensions/README.md:3-12](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_extensions/README.md#L3-L12) |

## 🔑 Reading Order

| Step | Read this | Reason | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Root `Cargo.toml` | Learn the live workspace surface. | [Cargo.toml:3-34](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/Cargo.toml#L3-L34) |
| 2 | Owner crate README | Understand declared boundaries before reading internals. | [crates/z00z_core/README.md:3-36](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/README.md#L3-L36) [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:171-183](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L171-L183) |
| 3 | `src/lib.rs` facade | See the stable exported surface. | [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:112-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L112-L132) [crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs:120-156](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs#L120-L156) |
| 4 | Integration harness docs | See how crates are supposed to compose. | [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:46-60](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L46-L60) |

## 📖 References

- [Cargo.toml:1-76](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/Cargo.toml#L1-L76)
- [crates/z00z_core/README.md:3-36](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/README.md#L3-L36)

- [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:6-30](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L6-L30)

## Related Pages

| Page | Relationship |
|---|---|
| [Setup And Verify](./setup-and-verify.md) | Converts the workspace shape into a concrete command sequence. |
| [Workspace Map](./workspace-map.md) | Expands this overview into a crate-by-crate inventory. |

</doc>

<doc title="Setup And Verify" path="./01-getting-started/setup-and-verify.md">

Z00Z already encodes its preferred verification path in repository-local instructions and scripts. The fastest way to avoid drift is to follow those exact commands instead of inventing a custom per-crate workflow. [.github/copilot-instructions.md:141-149](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/copilot-instructions.md#L141-L149) [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:64-103](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L64-L103)

## 🎯 At A Glance

| Component | Responsibility | Key file | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Workspace verify gate | Runs fmt, clippy, tests, docs, benches, runnable targets, and optional heavy stages. | `./.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh` | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:64-103](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L64-L103) |
| Crypto package verification | Publishes crate-local check, clippy, and test commands. | `crates/z00z_crypto/README.md` | [crates/z00z_crypto/README.md:28-35](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_crypto/README.md#L28-L35) |
| Wallet WASM lane | Documents native and `wasm32` checks for wallet work. | `crates/z00z_wallets/README.md` | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:113-149](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L113-L149) |
| Simulator entrypoint | Exposes the scenario runner binary. | `crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml` | [crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml:26-36](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml#L26-L36) |

## 🧭 Verify Flow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  Start[Start from repo root] --> Fmt[cargo fmt --check]
  Fmt --> Clippy[cargo clippy workspace release]
  Clippy --> Tests[cargo test --all]
  Tests --> Gate[full_verify.sh]
  Gate --> Heavy[Optional max-safe stage]
  Heavy --> Done[Ready for review]
```
<!-- Sources: .github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:64-103, .github/copilot-instructions.md:141-149 -->

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant Dev
  participant Script as full_verify.sh
  participant Cargo
  participant Report as reports/full_verify-report-long-running-tests.txt
  Dev->>Script: ./full_verify.sh --max-safe-run
  Script->>Cargo: fmt, clippy, tests, docs, benches
  Cargo-->>Script: exit codes and harness output
  Script->>Report: append slow-test evidence when needed
  Script-->>Dev: pass/fail plus elapsed time
```
<!-- Sources: .github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:9-20, .github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:64-103, .github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:173-207 -->

```mermaid
graph LR
  Root[Root Workspace] --> Core[cargo test -p z00z_core]
  Root --> Crypto[cargo test -p z00z_crypto]
  Root --> Wallet[cargo check -p z00z_wallets --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features wasm]
  Root --> Simulator[cargo run -p z00z_simulator --bin scenario_1 -- --help]
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_core/Cargo.toml:1-34, crates/z00z_crypto/README.md:28-35, crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:113-149, crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml:26-36 -->

## ⚙️ Canonical Commands

| Scope | Command | Why this is canonical | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Formatting | `cargo fmt --check` | First stage in the repository verify gate. | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:73-76](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L73-L76) |
| Lint | `cargo clippy --workspace --release --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` | Matches the gate exactly, including all targets and release mode. | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:73-76](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L73-L76) |
| Workspace tests | `cargo test --all` | Repository-local instructions require all tests to pass before completion. | [.github/copilot-instructions.md:141-149](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/copilot-instructions.md#L141-L149) |
| Release-style gate | `./.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh` | Adds docs, benches, runnable targets, and slow-test collection. | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:73-83](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L73-L83) |
| Max-safe sweep | `./.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh --max-safe-run` | Enables the optional max-safe stage that reuses prebuilt artifacts. | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:66-72](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L66-L72) |

## 🔧 Crate-Specific Shortcuts

| Crate | Useful targeted command | When to use it | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `z00z_crypto` | `cargo test --package z00z_crypto --release --features test-params-fast` | Fastest focused pass when touching crypto internals. | [crates/z00z_crypto/README.md:28-35](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_crypto/README.md#L28-L35) |
| `z00z_wallets` | `cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features wasm -p z00z_wallets` | Validate the wallet WASM lane after wallet changes. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:117-127](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L117-L127) |
| `z00z_simulator` | `cargo run --package z00z_simulator --bin scenario_1 -- --help` | Confirm the harness binary resolves and its CLI wiring is intact. | [crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml:26-36](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml#L26-L36) [crates/z00z_simulator/bin/scenario_1.rs:71-73](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/bin/scenario_1.rs#L71-L73) |
| `z00z_core` | `cargo test --package z00z_core --release --all-features` | Focus on protocol, genesis, and asset changes. | [crates/z00z_core/Cargo.toml:43-69](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/Cargo.toml#L43-L69) |

## 🛑 What The Gate Actually Adds

| Gate stage beyond ordinary `cargo test` | Why it matters | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Doc tests and `cargo doc`-style surface checks | Keeps public API documentation from silently drifting. | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:76-79](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L76-L79) |
| `cargo bench --no-run` | Detects bench compile regressions even when no benchmark is executed. | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:78-80](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L78-L80) |
| Runnable target sweep | Checks whitelisted bins/examples still launch. | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:79-83](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L79-L83) |
| Long-test report | Emits a persistent report for suites that exceed the configured threshold. | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:9-13](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L9-L13) [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:173-207](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L173-L207) |

## 📖 References

- [.github/copilot-instructions.md:141-149](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/copilot-instructions.md#L141-L149)
- [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:64-103](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L64-L103)
- [crates/z00z_crypto/README.md:28-35](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_crypto/README.md#L28-L35)
- [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:113-149](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L113-L149)
- [crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml:26-36](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml#L26-L36)

## Related Pages

| Page | Relationship |
|---|---|
| [Workspace Overview](./workspace-overview.md) | Explains why these commands are run from the workspace root. |
| [Workspace Map](./workspace-map.md) | Helps choose the right crate for targeted commands. |
| [Scenario Pipeline](../06-simulator-and-quality/scenario-pipeline.md) | Shows why simulator commands matter in the release packet. |

</doc>

<doc title="Workspace Map" path="./01-getting-started/workspace-map.md">

This page is the practical inventory: which crate owns what, which crates are intentionally thin, and where a contributor should look before opening implementation files. It follows crate READMEs and root facades instead of inferring ownership from directory names alone. [crates/z00z_core/README.md:3-36](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/README.md#L3-L36) [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:171-183](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L171-L183) [crates/z00z_utils/README.md:3-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_utils/README.md#L3-L25)

## 🎯 At A Glance

| Crate | Role | Key file | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `z00z_core` | Protocol objects and genesis. | `crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L103-L132) |
| `z00z_wallets` | Wallet state, object inventory, RPC, receiver, tx. | `crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs:97-156](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs#L97-L156) |
| `z00z_storage` | Settlement truth and proof contracts. | `crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs` | [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs:32-93](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs#L32-L93) |
| `z00z_simulator` | Canonical cross-crate scenario harness. | `crates/z00z_simulator/src/scenario_1/mod.rs` | [crates/z00z_simulator/src/scenario_1/mod.rs:8-37](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/src/scenario_1/mod.rs#L8-L37) |
| Runtime crates | Planning, validation, observation. | `crates/z00z_runtime/*/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/src/lib.rs:18-44](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/src/lib.rs#L18-L44) [crates/z00z_runtime/validators/src/lib.rs:14-28](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/validators/src/lib.rs#L14-L28) [crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/src/lib.rs:13-20](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/src/lib.rs#L13-L20) |

## 🧭 Crate Inventory

```mermaid
graph TB
  Core[z00z_core] --> Wallet[z00z_wallets]
  Core --> Storage[z00z_storage]
  Crypto[z00z_crypto] --> Core
  Utils[z00z_utils] --> Core
  Utils --> Wallet
  Runtime[z00z_runtime/*] --> Storage
  Rollup[z00z_rollup_node] --> Runtime
  Simulator[z00z_simulator] --> Wallet
  Simulator --> Rollup
  Rpc[z00z_networks_rpc] --> Wallet
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml:38-55, crates/z00z_wallets/Cargo.toml:76-87, crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:15-31 -->

```mermaid
flowchart TD
  Change[Need to change behavior] --> Ask{What kind of behavior?}
  Ask -->|Protocol object| Core[z00z_core]
  Ask -->|Wallet state or RPC| Wallet[z00z_wallets]
  Ask -->|Settlement proof or root| Storage[z00z_storage]
  Ask -->|Planning or verdicts| Runtime[z00z_runtime/*]
  Ask -->|Transport-only RPC| Rpc[z00z_networks_rpc]
  Ask -->|Scenario-only harness| Sim[z00z_simulator]
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_core/README.md:8-17, crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:171-183, crates/z00z_storage/README.md:4-18, crates/z00z_networks/rpc/README.md:3-18, crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:12-22 -->

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant Reader
  participant README as Crate README
  participant Facade as src/lib.rs
  participant Impl as Deep module
  Reader->>README: read ownership statement
  README-->>Reader: boundary and preferred facades
  Reader->>Facade: inspect exports
  Facade-->>Reader: stable surface
  Reader->>Impl: inspect only after owner is confirmed
  Impl-->>Reader: implementation detail
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_core/README.md:3-20, crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:171-183, crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:34-80 -->

## 📦 Major Crates

| Crate | What it owns | What it explicitly does not own | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `z00z_core` | Assets, genesis, actions, policies, rights, vouchers. | It does not treat `assets_config.yaml` as a second genesis authority. | [crates/z00z_core/README.md:22-43](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/README.md#L22-L43) |
| `z00z_wallets` | Wallet object inventory, services, receiver, tx, RPC, persistence. | It does not overload `wallet.asset.*` with voucher/right semantics. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:11-37](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L11-L37) |
| `z00z_storage` | Settlement paths, roots, stores, proof envelopes, checkpoint-facing roots. | It does not collapse checkpoint/snapshot/serialization into one generic backup layer. | [crates/z00z_storage/README.md:4-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/README.md#L4-L18) |
| `z00z_runtime/aggregators` | Planner, placement, publication, recovery, distributed scheduler. | It does not own settlement semantics, proof verification, or rollup orchestration. | [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md:18-29](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md#L18-L29) |
| `z00z_runtime/validators` | Checkpoint, spend, tx/claim verification, verdicts. | It does not own planner admission or watcher projection. | [crates/z00z_runtime/validators/README.md:13-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/validators/README.md#L13-L18) |
| `z00z_runtime/watchers` | Observation snapshots, alerts, publication and provider health evidence. | It does not create semantic truth beside validators and storage. | [crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md:11-16](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md#L11-L16) |
| `z00z_rollup_node` | Composition root for rollup-mode services and settlement theorem verification. | It does not move planner authority out of runtime or storage truth out of storage. | [crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md:3-15](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md#L3-L15) |
| `z00z_networks_rpc` | Request dispatch and transport adaptation. | It does not own peer identity, auth, retry, or connection lifecycle. | [crates/z00z_networks/rpc/README.md:5-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/rpc/README.md#L5-L18) |
| `z00z_networks/onionnet` | Reserved privacy-overlay namespace. | It is not an RPC alias or separate application service. | [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:3-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md#L3-L25) |

## 🔑 Thin But Important Crates

| Crate | Why it stays thin | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `z00z_telemetry` | Provides one stable observability entrypoint without yet claiming domain behavior. | [crates/z00z_telemetry/README.md:3-12](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_telemetry/README.md#L3-L12) [crates/z00z_telemetry/src/lib.rs:1-2](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_telemetry/src/lib.rs#L1-L2) |
| `z00z_extensions` | Reserves an add-on boundary without stealing ownership from core crates. | [crates/z00z_extensions/README.md:3-12](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_extensions/README.md#L3-L12) [crates/z00z_extensions/Cargo.toml:2-8](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_extensions/Cargo.toml#L2-L8) |

## 📖 References

- [crates/z00z_core/README.md:3-43](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/README.md#L3-L43)
- [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:11-37](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L11-L37)
- [crates/z00z_storage/README.md:4-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/README.md#L4-L18)
- [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md:3-29](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md#L3-L29)
- [crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md:3-15](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md#L3-L15)
