| Page | Relationship |
|---|---|
| [System Overview](../02-architecture/system-overview.md) | Converts this inventory into system interactions. |
| [Crate Boundaries](../02-architecture/crate-boundaries.md) | Goes deeper on why these ownership seams exist. |
| [Object Model And Genesis](../03-core-protocol/object-model-and-genesis.md) | Starts from the main protocol owner highlighted here. |

</doc>


## Deep Dive

<doc title="Object Model And Genesis" path="./03-core-protocol/object-model-and-genesis.md">

The protocol layer treats genesis as the canonical bootstrap authority for assets, rights, policies, and vouchers, then exports a derived settlement corpus and manifest from that one source of truth. The repo documentation is explicit that registry YAML is secondary data, not a competing genesis authority. [crates/z00z_core/README.md:22-43](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/README.md#L22-L43) [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:115-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L115-L132)

## 🎯 At A Glance

| Component | Responsibility | Key file | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Stable protocol facade | Re-exports assets, policies, rights, vouchers, and `ChainType`. | `crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:115-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L115-L132) |
| Genesis facade | Re-exports the generation, digest, and manifest surfaces. | `crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/mod.rs` | [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/mod.rs:189-212](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/mod.rs#L189-L212) |
| Typed config manifest | Loads assets, rights, policies, vouchers, outputs, and performance knobs from YAML. | `crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs` | [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs:49-61](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs#L49-L61) |
| Orchestrator | Creates definitions, generates the settlement corpus, verifies proofs, and exports artifacts. | `crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs` | [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs:2-228](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs#L2-L228) |
| Voucher bootstrap shape | Validates manifest-time voucher entries, then materializes runtime-ready configs after policy resolution. | `crates/z00z_core/src/vauchers/voucher_bootstrap.rs` | [crates/z00z_core/src/vauchers/voucher_bootstrap.rs:10-92](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/vauchers/voucher_bootstrap.rs#L10-L92) |

## 🧭 Bootstrap Flow

```mermaid
graph TB
  Manifest[GenesisConfig YAML] --> Parse[load_genesis_config]
  Parse --> Defs[create asset definitions]
  Defs --> Policies[generate_genesis_policies]
  Policies --> Corpus[generate_genesis_settlement_corpus]
  Corpus --> Verify[verify_genesis_assets and consensus checks]
  Verify --> Export[export_genesis_settlement_artifacts]
  Export --> ManifestJson[genesis_settlement_manifest.json]
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs:230-246, crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs:26-176, crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_settlement_manifest.rs:341-493 -->

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant YAML as Genesis YAML
  participant Run as run_genesis
  participant Acc as Settlement Corpus
  participant Disk as Output Directory
  YAML->>Run: load chain/assets/rights/policies/vouchers/outputs/performance
  Run->>Acc: materialize definitions, policies, rights, vouchers
  Acc-->>Run: counts, leaves, digests, state hash
  Run->>Disk: export assets, rights, vouchers, manifest
  Disk-->>Run: paths for report and artifacts
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs:49-61, crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs:7-24, crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs:147-225, crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_settlement_manifest.rs:458-493 -->

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  VoucherBootstrap[VoucherBootstrapEntryV1] --> Validate[validate placeholder shape]
  Validate --> Resolve[resolve policy and action identifiers]
  Resolve --> Materialize[materialize to VoucherConfigEntry]
  Materialize --> Corpus[store in genesis settlement corpus]
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_core/src/vauchers/voucher_bootstrap.rs:31-92, crates/z00z_core/src/vauchers/voucher_config.rs:140-220, crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs:257-260 -->

## 📦 Object Families

| Family | Where it is declared | What genesis does with it | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Assets | `z00z_core::assets` and `AssetConfigEntry` | Builds definitions first, then generates asset leaves and proofs. | [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:116-120](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L116-L120) [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs:26-38](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs#L26-L38) |
| Rights | `RightsConfigEntry` in the manifest | Feeds the settlement corpus and later rights export plus manifest counts. | [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs:53-60](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs#L53-L60) [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs:72-82](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs#L72-L82) |
| Policies | `PolicyConfigEntryV1` and generated records | Derives policy/action pools before voucher and right materialization. | [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs:55-58](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs#L55-L58) [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs:69-71](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs#L69-L71) |
| Vouchers | `VoucherBootstrapEntryV1` bootstrap entries | Validates a manifest-time entry, then resolves it into a concrete voucher config. | [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs:57-60](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs#L57-L60) [crates/z00z_core/src/vauchers/voucher_bootstrap.rs:47-92](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/vauchers/voucher_bootstrap.rs#L47-L92) |

## 🔑 Current-State Caveats

| Topic | What the code currently does | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `performance.num_threads` | The manifest parses and validates `performance.num_threads`, including rejecting `0`, but the visible orchestration path logs `rayon::current_num_threads()` and does not build a dedicated Rayon pool from that field. Effective thread count therefore comes from the global Rayon configuration visible to the process. | [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs:205-221](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs#L205-L221) [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config_validate.rs:126-133](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config_validate.rs#L126-L133) [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs:17-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs#L17-L25) |
| Manifest path | `genesis_settlement_manifest.json` is written into the timestamped `output_dir` returned from `create_timestamped_output_dir(...)`, and that directory is derived from `outputs.assets_export_path`. | [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs:14-16](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs#L14-L16) [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_settlement_manifest.rs:10](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_settlement_manifest.rs#L10-L10) [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_settlement_manifest.rs:487-493](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_settlement_manifest.rs#L487-L493) |
| `genesis_output.rs` shim | The file is intentionally thin: it keeps the timestamp helper but then re-exports `genesis_output_support.rs`, while `genesis.rs` still includes `genesis_output.rs` as part of the canonical `genesis` module surface. | [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis.rs:49-53](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis.rs#L49-L53) [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_output.rs:1-55](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_output.rs#L1-L55) |

## 📖 References

- [crates/z00z_core/README.md:22-43](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/README.md#L22-L43)
- [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/mod.rs:189-212](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/mod.rs#L189-L212)
- [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs:49-61](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_config.rs#L49-L61)
- [crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs:2-228](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/genesis/genesis_run.rs#L2-L228)
- [crates/z00z_core/src/vauchers/voucher_bootstrap.rs:10-92](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/vauchers/voucher_bootstrap.rs#L10-L92)

## Related Pages

| Page | Relationship |
|---|---|
| [Wallet Architecture](../04-wallet-and-rpc/wallet-architecture.md) | Shows how the wallet consumes the typed object model that genesis bootstraps. |
| [Settlement Runtime And Rollup](../05-storage-runtime/settlement-runtime-and-rollup.md) | Follows bootstrap objects into storage and verification layers. |
| [Scenario Pipeline](../06-simulator-and-quality/scenario-pipeline.md) | Shows where the object model is exercised end-to-end. |

</doc>

<doc title="Wallet Architecture" path="./04-wallet-and-rpc/wallet-architecture.md">

The wallet crate is not an asset-only balance engine anymore. Its documented public model is a typed object inventory in which assets remain spendable cash, vouchers are conditional claims, and rights are authority inventory with zero spendable value. [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:11-37](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L11-L37)

## 🎯 At A Glance

| Component | Responsibility | Key file | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Wallet root facade | Re-exports stealth, wallet errors, services, receiver, and tx surfaces. | `crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs:97-156](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs#L97-L156) |
| Services facade | Publishes orchestration boundaries like `WalletService` and `AppService`. | `crates/z00z_wallets/src/services/mod.rs` | [crates/z00z_wallets/src/services/mod.rs:1-24](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/src/services/mod.rs#L1-L24) |
| RPC surface | Groups method modules and registration helpers for wallet/app dispatchers. | `crates/z00z_wallets/src/rpc/mod.rs` | [crates/z00z_wallets/src/rpc/mod.rs:24-91](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/src/rpc/mod.rs#L24-L91) |
| Transport seam | Supplies transport-only dispatch and local in-process testing helpers. | `crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs:4-19](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs#L4-L19) |

## 🧭 Wallet Surface

```mermaid
graph TB
  Wallet[z00z_wallets root] --> Stealth[stealth output surface]
  Wallet --> Receiver[receiver facade]
  Wallet --> Tx[tx facade]
  Wallet --> Services[services facade]
  Wallet --> Rpc[rpc module]
  Wallet --> Db[native db facade]
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs:97-156, crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:171-183 -->

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant Caller
  participant Rpc as wallet RPC
  participant Svc as WalletService
  participant Store as object inventory or asset store
  Caller->>Rpc: wallet.object.* or wallet.asset.*
  Rpc->>Svc: typed request
  Svc->>Store: load or mutate owned objects
  Store-->>Svc: typed result
  Svc-->>Rpc: wallet result
  Rpc-->>Caller: JSON-RPC response
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:23-37, crates/z00z_wallets/src/rpc/mod.rs:43-91, crates/z00z_wallets/src/services/mod.rs:16-24 -->

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  Asset[Asset id] --> Spendable[Spendable value lane]
  Voucher[Voucher id] --> ObjectRpc[wallet.object.*]
  Right[Right id] --> ObjectRpc
  Voucher -. not accepted .-> AssetRpc[wallet.asset.*]
  Right -. not accepted .-> AssetRpc
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:16-25, crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:38-44 -->

## 📦 Typed Object Model In The Wallet

| Object family | Wallet meaning | Allowed public lane | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Assets | Spendable value. | `wallet.asset.*` and `wallet.object.*` projections. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:16-24](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L16-L24) |
| Vouchers | Conditional claims with explicit lifecycle and redemption paths. | `wallet.object.*` only. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:16-24](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L16-L24) |
| Rights | Authority inventory contributing zero to spendable balance. | `wallet.object.*` only. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:18-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L18-L25) |
| Unknown-policy objects | Durable quarantine until policy descriptors are accepted. | Quarantine, not spendable balance. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:20-21](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L20-L21) [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:40-44](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L40-L44) |

## 🔑 Stable Facades And Internal Detail

| Preferred entrypoint | Why it is preferred | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `z00z_wallets::db::{WltSession, ScanStatePayload}` | Stable wallet-store boundary types. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:171-177](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L171-L177) |
| `z00z_wallets::services::{RateLimitPrecheck, WalletService}` | Canonical orchestration layer. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:173-175](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L173-L175) [crates/z00z_wallets/src/services/mod.rs:16-24](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/src/services/mod.rs#L16-L24) |
| `z00z_wallets::receiver::*` | Receiver-card and payment-request flows. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:175-177](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L175-L177) |
| `z00z_wallets::tx::{ClaimTxVerifier, TxVerifier}` | Transaction verification entrypoints. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:177-181](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L177-L181) |

## 📖 References

- [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:11-44](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L11-L44)
- [crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs:97-156](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs#L97-L156)
- [crates/z00z_wallets/src/rpc/mod.rs:24-91](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/src/rpc/mod.rs#L24-L91)
- [crates/z00z_wallets/src/services/mod.rs:1-24](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/src/services/mod.rs#L1-L24)
- [crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs:4-19](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs#L4-L19)

## Related Pages

| Page | Relationship |
|---|---|
| [Object Model And Genesis](../03-core-protocol/object-model-and-genesis.md) | Defines the object families the wallet projects. |
| [Settlement Runtime And Rollup](../05-storage-runtime/settlement-runtime-and-rollup.md) | Shows where wallet outputs land once committed. |
| [Networking And Telemetry](../07-networking-and-observability/networking-and-telemetry.md) | Expands the transport seam the wallet composes. |

</doc>

<doc title="Settlement Runtime And Rollup" path="./05-storage-runtime/settlement-runtime-and-rollup.md">

The storage layer is the semantic owner of settlement truth. Runtime crates, validators, watchers, and the rollup node all consume that truth, but the repo docs and public exports are explicit that they must not create competing roots, proof contracts, or publication bindings. [crates/z00z_storage/README.md:4-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/README.md#L4-L18) [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md:18-29](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md#L18-L29) [crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md:3-15](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md#L3-L15)

## 🎯 At A Glance

| Component | Responsibility | Key file | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Settlement module | Exposes `SettlementPath`, `SettlementStateRoot`, stores, proof checks, and object package contracts. | `crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs` | [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs:32-93](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs#L32-L93) |
| Aggregator runtime | Owns planning, placement, publication, and recovery boundaries. | `crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/src/lib.rs:18-44](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/src/lib.rs#L18-L44) |
| Validator runtime | Owns checkpoint flow, tx/claim verification, and verdict emission. | `crates/z00z_runtime/validators/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_runtime/validators/src/lib.rs:14-28](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/validators/src/lib.rs#L14-L28) |
| Watcher runtime | Owns observation and alert surfaces over published state. | `crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/src/lib.rs:13-20](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/src/lib.rs#L13-L20) |
| Rollup verifier | Verifies the canonical theorem bundle without reconstructing private witnesses. | `crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:85-165](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs#L85-L165) |

## 🧭 Ownership Flow

```mermaid
graph TB
  Wallet[Wallet or object producer] --> Settlement[SettlementStore]
  Settlement --> Aggregator[AggregatorService]
  Aggregator --> Validator[ValidatorService]
  Aggregator --> Watcher[WatcherService]
  Settlement --> Rollup[verify_settlement_theorem]
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:144-157, crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md:14-16, crates/z00z_runtime/validators/README.md:13-18, crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md:11-16, crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md:8-15 -->

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant Store as SettlementStore
  participant Agg as AggregatorService
  participant Val as ValidatorService
  participant Watch as WatcherService
  participant Rollup as verify_settlement_theorem
  Store-->>Agg: semantic StoreOp and route context
  Agg-->>Val: resolved batch
  Agg-->>Watch: publication state
  Store-->>Rollup: checkpoint artifact and exec input
  Rollup-->>Rollup: verify tx package, link, root, inclusion
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:172-183, crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/src/lib.rs:34-44, crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:97-165 -->

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  ProofBlob[ProofBlob and batch proof] --> StorageTruth[storage-owned verification]
  StorageTruth --> RuntimeMeta[runtime-owned planner metadata]
  RuntimeMeta --> Verdicts[validator and watcher outputs]
  Verdicts -. not semantic truth .-> StorageTruth
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:214-255, crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md:13-16, crates/z00z_runtime/validators/README.md:15-18 -->

## 📦 Why Storage Is The Semantic Authority

| Storage export | Meaning | Why downstream consumers must not replace it | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `SettlementPath` | Canonical typed address `definition_id -> serial_id -> terminal_id`. | Downstream code should consume typed paths, not invent flat aliases. | [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:8-16](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md#L8-L16) [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:82-103](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md#L82-L103) |
| `SettlementStateRoot` and `CheckRoot` | Semantic settlement commitment and checkpoint-facing root type. | `backend_root` is intentionally private proof-local data. | [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:104-121](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md#L104-L121) |
| `ObjectPolicyRegistryV1` and `RuntimeObjectPackageV1` | Storage-owned object package contract used by validators. | Validator and runtime layers reuse the contract rather than forking a second object-policy surface. | [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs:45-49](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs#L45-L49) [crates/z00z_runtime/validators/src/lib.rs:26-28](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/validators/src/lib.rs#L26-L28) |

## 🔑 Downstream Boundaries

| Crate | What it may consume | What it must not claim | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `z00z_runtime/aggregators` | Route metadata, placement, publication binding, semantic `StoreOp` handoff. | Settlement semantics or proof truth. | [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md:20-29](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/README.md#L20-L29) |
| `z00z_runtime/validators` | Resolved batches, storage-owned proof contracts, object packages. | Planner admission or watcher projection. | [crates/z00z_runtime/validators/README.md:13-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/validators/README.md#L13-L18) |
| `z00z_runtime/watchers` | Published state and placement metadata for observation. | Semantic truth beyond evidence and alerting. | [crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md:11-16](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md#L11-L16) |
| `z00z_rollup_node` | `TxPackage`, `CheckpointArtifact`, `CheckpointExecInput`, `CheckpointLink`. | A second protocol owner or private-witness rebuilder. | [crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:85-165](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs#L85-L165) |

## 📖 References

- [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs:32-93](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs#L32-L93)
- [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md:82-121](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/README.md#L82-L121)
- [crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/src/lib.rs:18-44](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/aggregators/src/lib.rs#L18-L44)
- [crates/z00z_runtime/validators/src/lib.rs:14-28](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/validators/src/lib.rs#L14-L28)
- [crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs:97-165](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/src/lib.rs#L97-L165)

## Related Pages

| Page | Relationship |
|---|---|
| [Object Model And Genesis](../03-core-protocol/object-model-and-genesis.md) | Explains the objects that eventually become settlement leaves. |
| [Wallet Architecture](../04-wallet-and-rpc/wallet-architecture.md) | Shows the user-facing producer of many settlement objects. |
| [Scenario Pipeline](../06-simulator-and-quality/scenario-pipeline.md) | Demonstrates how these layers are exercised end to end. |

</doc>

<doc title="Scenario Pipeline" path="./06-simulator-and-quality/scenario-pipeline.md">

`z00z_simulator` is intentionally an integration harness, not a second application framework. Its README and module root are explicit that scenario code must enter other crates through stable facades and that `scenario_1` remains the canonical executable home for the Phase 059 object model. [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:6-30](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L6-L30) [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:62-92](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L62-L92)

## 🎯 At A Glance

| Component | Responsibility | Key file | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Simulator root | Re-exports actor, config, context, design, result, and scenario facades. | `crates/z00z_simulator/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_simulator/src/lib.rs:6-39](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/src/lib.rs#L6-L39) |
| `scenario_1` module | Declares stages, runner, and process guard for the canonical scenario pipeline. | `crates/z00z_simulator/src/scenario_1/mod.rs` | [crates/z00z_simulator/src/scenario_1/mod.rs:8-37](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/src/scenario_1/mod.rs#L8-L37) |
| CLI binary | Resolves `--config` and `--design` arguments, then delegates to the runner. | `crates/z00z_simulator/bin/scenario_1.rs` | [crates/z00z_simulator/bin/scenario_1.rs:11-73](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/bin/scenario_1.rs#L11-L73) |
| Release-style verify gate | Supplies the heavy repository verification path that the simulator complements. | `.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh` | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:64-103](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L64-L103) |

## 🧭 Scenario Shape

```mermaid
graph TB
  Scenario1[scenario_1] --> Stage1[stage_1]
  Scenario1 --> Stage4[stage_4]
  Scenario1 --> Stage9[stage_9]
  Scenario1 --> Stage13[stage_13]
  Scenario1 --> Runner[runner and verification helpers]
  Scenario1 --> Support[support modules]
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_simulator/src/scenario_1/mod.rs:8-27 -->

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant CLI as scenario_1 binary
  participant Runner as scenario_1::runner
  participant Harness as Simulator context
  participant Artifacts as Public artifacts
  CLI->>Runner: run default or path-based execution
  Runner->>Harness: build scenario context and stage flow
  Harness->>Artifacts: emit flow JSON and summary material
  Artifacts-->>CLI: scenario result and stage statuses
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_simulator/bin/scenario_1.rs:11-67, crates/z00z_simulator/src/lib.rs:23-39, crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:75-92 -->

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  StableFacades[Stable crate facades] --> Scenario[Simulator stages]
  Scenario --> Evidence[asset_flow / voucher_flow / right_flow]
  Evidence --> Verify[full verify or release review]
  Verify --> Decision[accept or debug]
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:24-30, crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:75-92, .github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:79-83 -->

## 📦 Why `scenario_1` Matters

| Aspect | Current contract | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Canonical executable | `scenario_1` is the live home of the Phase 059 object model and was extended in place. | [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:62-66](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L62-L66) |
| Object lanes | Covers asset transfer, voucher lifecycle, right lifecycle, and right-gated voucher actions. | [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:67-73](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L67-L73) |
| Artifact anchors | Publishes `asset_flow.json`, `voucher_flow.json`, `right_flow.json`, `wallet_scan.json`, `val_flow.json`, `watch_flow.json`, and `sim_summary.md`. | [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:75-89](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L75-L89) |
| Negative evidence | Reject and fix surfaces are mandatory in the Phase 059 packet. | [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:91-93](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L91-L93) |

## 🔑 Integration Boundary Rules

| Rule | Meaning in practice | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Use stable facades | If the harness needs a new entrypoint, add it to the owner crate instead of deep-importing internals. | [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:24-30](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L24-L30) |
| Harness-only code stays narrow | Deterministic fixture setup is fine; business-rule ownership is not. | [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:12-22](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L12-L22) |
| Secret artifact policy is strict | Plaintext wallet-secret artifacts are debug-only, gated, and outside the default contract. | [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:32-45](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L32-L45) |

## 📖 References

- [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:6-30](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L6-L30)
- [crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:62-92](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/README.md#L62-L92)
- [crates/z00z_simulator/src/lib.rs:6-39](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/src/lib.rs#L6-L39)
- [crates/z00z_simulator/src/scenario_1/mod.rs:8-37](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/src/scenario_1/mod.rs#L8-L37)
- [crates/z00z_simulator/bin/scenario_1.rs:11-73](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/bin/scenario_1.rs#L11-L73)

## Related Pages

| Page | Relationship |
|---|---|
| [Workspace Overview](../01-getting-started/workspace-overview.md) | Gives the top-level context for why the simulator exists as its own crate. |
| [Wallet Architecture](../04-wallet-and-rpc/wallet-architecture.md) | One of the main stable facades the simulator composes. |
| [Settlement Runtime And Rollup](../05-storage-runtime/settlement-runtime-and-rollup.md) | Covers the downstream layers the simulator exercises. |

</doc>

<doc title="Networking And Telemetry" path="./07-networking-and-observability/networking-and-telemetry.md">

The networking and observability story is deliberately split into three different ownership zones: transport-only RPC in `z00z_networks_rpc`, a reserved privacy-overlay namespace in `onionnet`, and operational observation surfaces in watcher and telemetry crates. The code repeatedly warns against collapsing these into one generic “network” module. [crates/z00z_networks/rpc/README.md:3-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/rpc/README.md#L3-L18) [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:16-31](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md#L16-L31) [crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md:11-16](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md#L11-L16)

## 🎯 At A Glance

| Component | Responsibility | Key file | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `z00z_networks_rpc` | RPC request dispatch, transport adaptation, local transport, and WASM client. | `crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs:64-98](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs#L64-L98) |
| `onionnet` | Reserved Phase 115 privacy-overlay crate boundary. | `crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/src/lib.rs:13-126](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/src/lib.rs#L13-L126) |
| Watchers | Publication, provider, and alert observation surfaces. | `crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/src/lib.rs` | [crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/src/lib.rs:13-20](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/src/lib.rs#L13-L20) |
| Telemetry facade | Stable workspace entrypoint for shared observability concerns. | `crates/z00z_telemetry/README.md` | [crates/z00z_telemetry/README.md:3-12](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_telemetry/README.md#L3-L12) |

## 🧭 Network And Ops Layering

```mermaid
graph TB
  Wallet[z00z_wallets] --> Rpc[RpcTransport and RpcDispatcher]
  Wallet --> Onion[OnionNet mode or future overlay]
  Runtime[z00z_runtime] --> Watchers[WatcherService]
  Watchers --> Telemetry[z00z_telemetry facade]
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs:4-19, crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:18-25, crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/src/lib.rs:13-20, crates/z00z_telemetry/README.md:3-12 -->

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant App as wallet or node app
  participant Rpc as RpcTransport
  participant Overlay as OnionNet placeholder seam
  participant Watch as WatcherService
  App->>Rpc: dispatch method call
  App->>Overlay: choose overlay transport mode
  Watch-->>App: observation snapshot and alerts
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_networks/rpc/README.md:7-18, crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:16-31, crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md:11-16 -->

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  RpcConcerns[peer identity, auth, retry, connection lifecycle] -. kept outside .-> RpcCore[z00z_networks_rpc]
  OverlayConcerns[bridge admission, path privacy, replay filtering, exit handoff] --> Onion[onionnet]
  AlertConcerns[publication health, object verdict evidence] --> Watchers[watchers and telemetry]
```
<!-- Sources: crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs:8-19, crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:18-25, crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md:18-34 -->

## 🔑 Why RPC And OnionNet Stay Separate

| Surface | Current scope | Explicit exclusion | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `z00z_networks_rpc` | Generic transport and dispatch. | Peer identity, auth, retry policy, connection lifecycle. | [crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs:4-19](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs#L4-L19) |
| `onionnet` | Privacy-ingress transport concerns and reserved module structure. | RPC aliasing, sequencer logic, validator logic, or a standalone application service. | [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:16-31](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md#L16-L31) [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/src/lib.rs:2-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/src/lib.rs#L2-L18) |

## 📦 Observability Surfaces

| Surface | What it emits | Why it matters | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| `WatcherService` | Observation snapshots and alert classes. | Provides operational evidence without becoming semantic truth. | [crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/src/lib.rs:13-20](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/src/lib.rs#L13-L20) [crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md:11-16](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md#L11-L16) |
| Phase 059 alert families | Unknown policy, invalid backing, wrong-family proof, replay, expiry, and boundary violations. | Makes typed object failures observable without moving verdict ownership. | [crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md:18-34](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md#L18-L34) |
| `z00z_telemetry` | Stable crate-level home for shared observability wiring. | Avoids duplicating observability entrypoints across workspace crates. | [crates/z00z_telemetry/README.md:3-12](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_telemetry/README.md#L3-L12) [crates/z00z_telemetry/src/lib.rs:1-2](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_telemetry/src/lib.rs#L1-L2) |

## 📖 References

- [crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs:4-19](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/rpc/src/lib.rs#L4-L19)
- [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md:16-31](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/README.md#L16-L31)
- [crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/src/lib.rs:13-126](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/onionnet/src/lib.rs#L13-L126)
- [crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md:11-34](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_runtime/watchers/README.md#L11-L34)
- [crates/z00z_telemetry/README.md:3-12](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_telemetry/README.md#L3-L12)

## Related Pages

| Page | Relationship |
|---|---|
| [Wallet Architecture](../04-wallet-and-rpc/wallet-architecture.md) | Shows the main crate that consumes the RPC transport seam. |
| [Crate Boundaries](../02-architecture/crate-boundaries.md) | Explains why RPC, overlay, and observability are intentionally split. |
| [Settlement Runtime And Rollup](../05-storage-runtime/settlement-runtime-and-rollup.md) | Shows where watcher evidence fits in the runtime pipeline. |

</doc>


## Optional

<doc title="Z00Z Deep Wiki" path="./index.md">

Z00Z is a Cargo workspace that deliberately splits protocol, wallet, storage, runtime, simulator, networking, and observability responsibilities into separate crates instead of treating the repository as one monolithic node package. The workspace manifest and crate-root docs show that the project is organized around stable facades and explicit ownership boundaries. [Cargo.toml:1-76](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/Cargo.toml#L1-L76) [README.md:1-8](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/README.md#L1-L8) [crates/z00z_core/README.md:3-17](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/README.md#L3-L17) [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:11-37](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L11-L37)

## 🎯 Quick Start

| Command | Why run it | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `cargo fmt --check` | Enforce formatting before deeper verification. | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:73-76](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L73-L76) |
| `cargo clippy --workspace --release --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` | Run the canonical workspace lint gate. | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:73-76](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L73-L76) |
| `cargo test --all` | Baseline regression pass for all crates. | [.github/copilot-instructions.md:141-149](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/copilot-instructions.md#L141-L149) |
| `./.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh --max-safe-run` | Run the repository’s release-style verify gate, including optional heavy stages. | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:64-103](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L64-L103) |
| `cargo run --package z00z_simulator --bin scenario_1 -- --help` | Inspect the canonical simulator entrypoint. | [crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml:26-36](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml#L26-L36) [crates/z00z_simulator/bin/scenario_1.rs:71-73](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/bin/scenario_1.rs#L71-L73) |

## 🧭 Architecture Overview

```mermaid
graph TB
  A[Z00Z Workspace] --> B[z00z_core]
  A --> C[z00z_wallets]
  A --> D[z00z_storage]
  A --> E[z00z_runtime]
  A --> F[z00z_rollup_node]
  A --> G[z00z_simulator]
  A --> H[z00z_networks]
  A --> I[z00z_utils and z00z_crypto]
  C --> D
  C --> H
  E --> D
  F --> E
  F --> D
  G --> C
  G --> D
  G --> F
```
<!-- Sources: Cargo.toml:3-17, crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132, crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs:97-156, crates/z00z_storage/src/lib.rs:4-15, crates/z00z_simulator/Cargo.toml:38-55 -->

```mermaid
flowchart LR
  Dev[Contributor] --> Docs[Read wiki and root docs]
  Docs --> Verify[Run verify gate]
  Verify --> Facades[Follow stable crate facades]
  Facades --> Subsystems[Change owner crate]
  Subsystems --> Recheck[Re-run targeted tests]
  Recheck --> Release[Run full verify before merge]
```
<!-- Sources: deep-wiki-readme.md:71-106, .github/copilot-instructions.md:141-149, crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:24-30, .github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:64-103 -->

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  participant Dev as Developer
  participant Gate as Verify Gate
  participant Core as Owner Crate
  participant Sim as Simulator
  Dev->>Gate: cargo fmt / clippy / test
  Gate-->>Dev: workspace baseline
  Dev->>Core: update stable facade or owner module
  Core-->>Dev: compile and unit results
  Dev->>Sim: run scenario or integration path
  Sim-->>Dev: artifact and contract evidence
  Dev->>Gate: full_verify.sh --max-safe-run
  Gate-->>Dev: release-style confidence
```
<!-- Sources: .github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:64-103, crates/z00z_simulator/README.md:46-60, crates/z00z_core/README.md:22-36, crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:171-183 -->

## 📚 Documentation Map

| Section | What it explains | Start here when you need | Page |
|---|---|---|---|
| Getting Started | Workspace shape, setup, and verify loop. | First contact with the repo. | [Workspace Overview](./01-getting-started/workspace-overview.md) |
| Architecture | Layering and ownership seams. | Deciding where code belongs. | [System Overview](./02-architecture/system-overview.md) |
| Core Protocol | Object families, genesis, and bootstrap artifacts. | Understanding how protocol objects enter the system. | [Object Model And Genesis](./03-core-protocol/object-model-and-genesis.md) |
| Wallet And RPC | Wallet inventory, services, and JSON-RPC exposure. | Working on user-facing state and transport seams. | [Wallet Architecture](./04-wallet-and-rpc/wallet-architecture.md) |
| Storage Runtime And Rollup | Settlement proofs, runtime batching, validator/watcher surfaces, rollup theorem checks. | Tracing a committed object into storage or rollup evidence. | [Settlement Runtime And Rollup](./05-storage-runtime/settlement-runtime-and-rollup.md) |
| Simulator And Quality | Scenario harness and release-style evidence flow. | Reproducing multi-crate behavior. | [Scenario Pipeline](./06-simulator-and-quality/scenario-pipeline.md) |
| Networking And Observability | RPC transport, OnionNet placeholder, watcher and telemetry surfaces. | Following transport and ops-facing boundaries. | [Networking And Telemetry](./07-networking-and-observability/networking-and-telemetry.md) |

## 🔑 Key Files

| File | Why it matters | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `Cargo.toml` | Defines the workspace members and default member set. | [Cargo.toml:3-34](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/Cargo.toml#L3-L34) |
| `crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs` | Publishes the stable protocol facade. | [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L103-L132) |
| `crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs` | Publishes the wallet’s stable entrypoints and re-exports. | [crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs:97-156](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/src/lib.rs#L97-L156) |
| `crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs` | Re-exports the live settlement contract used by runtime and validators. | [crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs:32-93](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/src/settlement/mod.rs#L32-L93) |
| `crates/z00z_simulator/src/scenario_1/mod.rs` | Declares the canonical scenario stages and runner surface. | [crates/z00z_simulator/src/scenario_1/mod.rs:8-37](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_simulator/src/scenario_1/mod.rs#L8-L37) |
| `./.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh` | Encodes the canonical repository-wide verification sequence. | [.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh:64-103](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/.github/skills/z00z-full-verify-gate/scripts/full_verify.sh#L64-L103) |

## ⚙️ Tech Stack Summary

| Layer | Primary surface | Notes | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| Workspace orchestration | Cargo workspace | Fourteen default members form the live build surface. | [Cargo.toml:3-34](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/Cargo.toml#L3-L34) |
| Core protocol | `z00z_core` | Assets, genesis, policies, rights, and vouchers live here. | [crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs:103-132](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_core/src/lib.rs#L103-L132) |
| Crypto and shared primitives | `z00z_crypto`, `z00z_utils` | One facade for crypto, one cross-cutting crate for I/O/config/time/logging/RNG. | [crates/z00z_crypto/README.md:7-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_crypto/README.md#L7-L25) [crates/z00z_utils/README.md:3-25](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_utils/README.md#L3-L25) |
| User state and transport edges | `z00z_wallets`, `z00z_networks_rpc` | Wallet owns typed inventory; RPC crate stays transport-only. | [crates/z00z_wallets/README.md:11-37](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_wallets/README.md#L11-L37) [crates/z00z_networks/rpc/README.md:3-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_networks/rpc/README.md#L3-L18) |
| Durability and verification | `z00z_storage`, `z00z_rollup_node`, runtime crates | Storage owns settlement truth; runtime plans; validators/watchers observe; rollup node composes. | [crates/z00z_storage/README.md:4-18](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_storage/README.md#L4-L18) [crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md:3-15](https://github.com/z00z-labs/z00z/blob/z00z-dev/crates/z00z_rollup_node/README.md#L3-L15) |
